records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't take it anymore! How long am I supposed to babysit you people?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't take it anymore! How long am I supposed to babysit you people?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't take it anymore! How long am I supposed to babysit you people?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ever since you latched on, the office reeks of Hawaiian pizza!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ever since you latched on, the office reeks of Hawaiian pizza!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ever since you latched on, the office reeks of Hawaiian pizza!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How charming. How about changing your nickname from Smart Guy to Sweet Guy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How charming. How about changing your nickname from Smart Guy to Sweet Guy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How charming. How about changing your nickname from Smart Guy to Sweet Guy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's as sweet as a pineapple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's as sweet as a pineapple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's as sweet as a pineapple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds good to me. Kids these days prefer guys who are sweet and soft over stiff types.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds good to me. Kids these days prefer guys who are sweet and soft over stiff types.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds good to me. Kids these days prefer guys who are sweet and soft over stiff types.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. And you know, this pizza isn't half bad once you keep eating it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. And you know, this pizza isn't half bad once you keep eating it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. And you know, this pizza isn't half bad once you keep eating it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I figured soldiers ate MREs even off duty, but you've actually got taste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I figured soldiers ate MREs even off duty, but you've actually got taste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I figured soldiers ate MREs even off duty, but you've actually got taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a merc, you know a thing or two, pal. You're a hundred times better than a certain Smart Guy I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a merc, you know a thing or two, pal. You're a hundred times better than a certain Smart Guy I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a merc, you know a thing or two, pal. You're a hundred times better than a certain Smart Guy I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or is it Sweet Guy now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or is it Sweet Guy now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or is it Sweet Guy now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't live like this! This is my office!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't live like this! This is my office!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't live like this! This is my office!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Easy, boss. For how much she's been glued to us, she's at least paying her "cling fee," yeah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Easy, boss. For how much she's been glued to us, she's at least paying her "cling fee," yeah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Easy, boss. For how much she's been glued to us, she's at least paying her "cling fee," yeah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Business has been trash lately. A Hawaiian pizza for lunch? That's downright luxury.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Business has been trash lately. A Hawaiian pizza for lunch? That's downright luxury.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Business has been trash lately. A Hawaiian pizza for lunch? That's downright luxury.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pineapple crimes aside, pizza's still pizza.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pineapple crimes aside, pizza's still pizza.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pineapple crimes aside, pizza's still pizza.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let good enough be good enough, Mr. Mason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let good enough be good enough, Mr. Mason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let good enough be good enough, Mr. Mason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop fighting the sweetness and join the times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop fighting the sweetness and join the times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop fighting the sweetness and join the times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trend or not, are soldiers really allowed to loaf around like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trend or not, are soldiers really allowed to loaf around like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trend or not, are soldiers really allowed to loaf around like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know the score. Delta Seven teamed up with the Dark Council during the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know the score. Delta Seven teamed up with the Dark Council during the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know the score. Delta Seven teamed up with the Dark Council during the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shook hands with a crime syndicate. The bigwigs aren't exactly thrilled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We shook hands with a crime syndicate. The bigwigs aren't exactly thrilled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We shook hands with a crime syndicate. The bigwigs aren't exactly thrilled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if saving the world gets brushed aside, an indefinite suspension was bound to land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if saving the world gets brushed aside, an indefinite suspension was bound to land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if saving the world gets brushed aside, an indefinite suspension was bound to land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My point is, if you're disciplined, at least act like you're reflecting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My point is, if you're disciplined, at least act like you're reflecting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My point is, if you're disciplined, at least act like you're reflecting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And stop treating my office like your secret base!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And stop treating my office like your secret base!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And stop treating my office like your secret base!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's tough. Back on base I have to watch Kyle and Sylvia breathing down my neck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's tough. Back on base I have to watch Kyle and Sylvia breathing down my neck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's tough. Back on base I have to watch Kyle and Sylvia breathing down my neck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't treat a suspension like a vacation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't treat a suspension like a vacation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't treat a suspension like a vacation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phone vibrating? Don't tell me it's a job request.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phone vibrating? Don't tell me it's a job request.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phone vibrating? Don't tell me it's a job request.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hate to break it to you, but that's the Colonel's phone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hate to break it to you, but that's the Colonel's phone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hate to break it to you, but that's the Colonel's phone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Caller ID's blocked. Should I just kill the call?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Caller ID's blocked. Should I just kill the call?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Caller ID's blocked. Should I just kill the call?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pack up and get ready to move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pack up and get ready to move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pack up and get ready to move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The two of them are in the gear bay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The two of them are in the gear bay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The two of them are in the gear bay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gear? What are they getting ready for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gear? What are they getting ready for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gear? What are they getting ready for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Egh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Egh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Egh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Mr. President, brief us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Mr. President, brief us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Mr. President, brief us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should hear the details from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should hear the details from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should hear the details from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is someone from the Administration...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it is someone from the Administration...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it is someone from the Administration...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. But her face should be familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. But her face should be familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. But her face should be familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Caller ID's blocked. Should I just kill the call?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't do that, miss. Like it or not, the bigwigs kind of like me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though no one will be calling me in under these circumstances.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, looks like we just got dragged into a pain in the neck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Figures. If you're a taxpayer-paid civic servant, go do your job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mason, it helps to hear people out before you jump to conclusions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ones getting dragged in are <color=#ffd34c>us</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pack up and get ready to move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pack up and get ready to move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pack up and get ready to move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Preferably at full readiness to fight at any time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Salute. It has been a while, Mr. President.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right. I figured you were suffering, tangled in the politics you hate because of the Dark Council affair.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you look better than before. The downtime seems to have aired out the unit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if they don't show it, their sense of duty runs deep.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It has been one ordeal after another since the Replacer incident...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If not for the suspension, they would have kept fighting even by pushing themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you can probably guess why I recalled you while you were resting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Consider coming empty-handed my little show of displeasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand. I was contacted out of the blue myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the States' President gets jerked around from all sides.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Jerked around, my foot. Pretty absurd hearing that in front of your subordinates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Mr. President. See these games with zero hours played?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is what being jerked around looks like. A sad life with no leisure because of work.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only the playtime is zero. In reality you spend your free time modding ROM files.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, that is community service. Some of that code even got re-imported to the dev studio. Circle of life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who else on earth cleans up spaghetti code that has been tangled for ages?

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, where are Sleazeball and Milk Girl?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The two of them are in the gear bay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The two of them are in the gear bay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The two of them are in the gear bay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Colonel Walker and Major Kropel are core to Delta Seven, so the checks are strict.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gear? What are they getting ready for?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gear? What are they getting ready for?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gear? What are they getting ready for?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. As of now, Delta Seven's indefinite suspension is lifted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will resume missions under the States Strategic Special Operations Command.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Egh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Egh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Egh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I half expected it, so the sudden emergency call was because of this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the higher-ups sided with us even after we worked with the Council...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means there is an immediate threat we must stop, diplomacy aside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah, I know. It means we got stuck with something annoying!

root.m_Talk_ENG: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As Kyle says, if it outweighs the side issues on the scale, this is no ordinary business.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Mr. President, brief us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Mr. President, brief us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Mr. President, brief us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The highest-level disasters that broke out worldwide recently...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If those are omens like the Hollow God that heralded the last Qliphoth Game...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then has the disaster we faced before, the Divine C.O. entity called the Demon Lord, begun to move?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you. I was only contacted out of the blue.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You should hear the details from the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You should hear the details from the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You should hear the details from the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it is someone from the Administration...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it is someone from the Administration...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it is someone from the Administration...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely you mean the Supreme Administrator who appeared at the final phase of the Qliphoth Game?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. But her face should be familiar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. But her face should be familiar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. But her face should be familiar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, she is an Official Administration Counter of the Chamber Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, ah... People of the States, can you hear me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name is Yanikka Shirokova.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On behalf of the Chamber Administration, there is something I wish to tell you all.

unsupported: Delta Seven Emergency Call, one hour later.]]
